description_long: This object represents a human jogger in mid-stride, with a dynamic, forward-leaning posture typical of running. The figure is slender and elongated, with limbs extended to suggest motion, and the overall form is stylized with sharp, angular features. The surface is uniformly dark, almost black, with a glossy finish that reflects light, giving the figure a sleek, modern appearance. No facial features or fine anatomical details are visible, and the clothing and footwear are not distinctly separated from the body, blending into the same dark material. The jogger's arms are bent at the elbows, and one leg is extended forward while the other is trailing behind, capturing the essence of a running gait. There are no visible accessories, headwear, or distinguishing marks on the figure.
description: A sleek, stylized dark jogger figure in a dynamic running pose with glossy, reflective surfaces and angular features.
description_view_0: The jogger's side profile is visible, highlighting the elongated limbs and forward-leaning running posture.
description_view_1: A partial view from behind, showing the back and the trailing leg, with the arm and torso partially obscured.
description_view_2: A close-up of the lower body and extended leg, emphasizing the sharp angles and reflective surface.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective, focusing on the upper body and head, with the arms and torso forming sleek, angular lines.
attribute_clothing_type: Fitted, seamless bodysuit with a glossy finish, no visible seams or fabric texture.
attribute_footwear_type: Running shoes integrated into the bodysuit, indistinguishable from the rest of the figure, with a glossy black appearance and no visible sole details.
attribute_running_posture: Forward-leaning, dynamic running posture with one leg extended forward, the other trailing behind, and arms bent at the elbows in a typical mid-stride position.
